briefdescription.para: Maximum number of driver instances running at the same time.
Success flag.
Failure flag.
Node name maximum length.
Maximum CC number.
Maximum anntena number.
Maximum sequence length.
Maximum Fabric NCO number.
Maximum NCO number, 16 CC NCO + 4 aux NCO.
Maximum CC gain.
Not ready state.
Ready state.
Reset state.
Configured state.
Initialised state.
Operational state.
API initialises one instance of a Mixer driver.

detaileddescription.para: Traverses "/sys/bus/platform/device" directory (in Linux), to find registered XDfeMix device with the name DeviceNodeName. The first available slot in the instances array XDfeMix_Mixer[] will be taken as a DeviceNodeName object. On success it moves the state machine to a Ready state, while on failure stays in a Not Ready state.

listitem.para: Pointer to the instance if successful.

briefdescription.para: API closes the instance of a Mixer driver and moves the state machine to a Not Ready state.
Resets Mixer and puts block into a reset state.
Reads configuration from device tree/xparameters.h and IP registers.

detaileddescription.para: Removes S/W reset and moves the state machine to a Configured state.

briefdescription.para: DFE Mixer driver one time initialisation which sets registers to initialisation values, moves the state machine to Initialised state and in switchable mode sets Uplink registers to initialisation value.
Enables triggers and moves the state machine to an Activated state.
Deactivates triggers and moves the state machine to Initialised state.
Gets a state machine state id.
Returns the current CC and NCO configurations.

detaileddescription.para: Not used slot ID in a sequence (Sequence.CCID[Index]) are represented as (-1), not the value in registers.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current CC and NCO configuration for Downlink and Uplink in switchable mode.

detaileddescription.para: Not used slot ID in a sequence (Sequence.CCID[Index]) are represented as (-1), not the value in registers.

briefdescription.para: Returns configuration structure CCCfg with CCCfg->Sequence.Length value set in XDfeMix_Configure(), array CCCfg->Sequence.CCID[] members are set to not used value (-1) and the other CCCfg members are set to 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfeMix *InstancePtr, XDfeMix_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 *CCSeqBitmap, XDfeMix_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, XDfeMix_NCO *NCO)
memberdef.name: XDfeMix_GetCarrierCfgAndNCO

briefdescription.para: Returns the current CC sequence bitmap, CCID carrier configuration and NCO configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID for which configuration parameters are returned, range [0-15].

briefdescription.para: Set antenna configuration in CC configuration container.

parameterdescription.para: Structure containing the array of all antenna gain configurations.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeMix *InstancePtr, XDfeMix_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfeMix_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, const XDfeMix_NCO *NCO)
memberdef.name: XDfeMix_AddCCtoCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Adds specified CCID, with specified configuration, to a local CC configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error. Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

The CCID sequence register values 0-15 can define the slot as either used or not used. That's why the register values are translated into CCCfg.Sequence The translation is:
Sequence.CCID[i] = -1 - if [i] is unused slot
Sequence.CCID[i] = CCID - if [i] is used slot
a returned Sequence.Length = length in register + 1

When the number of usable CC's is greater than four there is an additional restriction on the CC sequence as described in "Component Carrier Sequencing". This will be verified by the API to ensure a violation does not occur.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to be added to configuration, range [0-15].

briefdescription.para: Removes specified CCID from a local CC configuration structure and the slots in the sequence for that CCID are set to -1.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to be removed, range [0-15].

simplesect.para: For a sequence conversion see XDfeMix_AddCCtoCCCfg() comment.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeMix *InstancePtr, XDfeMix_CCCfg *CCCfg, const s32 AuxId, const XDfeMix_NCO *NCO, const XDfeMix_AuxiliaryCfg *AuxCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfeMix_AddAuxNCOtoCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Adds specified auxiliary NCO, with specified configuration, to a local CCCfg.

parameterdescription.para: Auxiliary NCO ID to be enabled, range [0-3].

briefdescription.para: Disables specified auxiliary NCO configuration structure.

parameterdescription.para: Auxiliary NCO ID to be disabled, range [0-3].

briefdescription.para: Updates specified CCID, with specified configuration to a local CC configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: An error is generated if the NCOidx selected is already used.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to be updated, range [0-15].

briefdescription.para: Writes local CC configuration to the shadow (NEXT) registers and triggers copying from shadow to operational registers.
Writes local CC configuration to the shadow (NEXT) registers and triggers copying from shadow to operational (CURRENT) registers for both Downlink and Upling in switchable mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeMix *InstancePtr, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfeMix_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, const XDfeMix_NCO *NCO)
memberdef.name: XDfeMix_AddCC

briefdescription.para: Adds specified CCID, with specified configuration.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error. Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

parameterdescription.para: - up to 16 defined slots into which a CC can be allocated. The number of slots can be from 1 to 16 depending on system initialization. The number of slots is defined by the "sequence length" parameter which is provided during initialization. The Bit offset within the CCSeqBitmap indicates the equivalent Slot number to allocate. e.g. 0x0003 means the caller wants the passed component carrier (CC) to be allocated to slots 0 and 1.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeMix_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

: This API is deprecated in the release 2023.2. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with the following API sequence: XDfeMix_GetCurrentCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg); XDfeMix_AddCCtoCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg, CCID, CCSeqBitmap, CarrierCfg, NCO); XDfeMix_SetNextCCCfgAndTrigger(InstancePtr, CCCfg);

briefdescription.para: Removes specified CCID.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeMix_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

: This API is deprecated in the release 2023.2. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with the following API sequence: XDfeMix_GetCurrentCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg); XDfeMix_RemoveCCfromCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg, CCID); XDfeMix_SetNextCCCfgAndTrigger(InstancePtr, CCCfg);

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeMix *InstancePtr, s32 CCID, u32 Rate, u32 FromNCO, u32 ToNCO)
memberdef.name: XDfeMix_MoveCC

briefdescription.para: Moves specified CCID from one NCO to another aligning phase to make it transparent.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeMix_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

: This API is deprecated in the release 2023.2. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with the following API sequence: XDfeMix_GetCurrentCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg); XDfeMix_UpdateCCinCCCfg(); XDfeMix_SetNextCCCfgAndTrigger(InstancePtr, CCCfg); This will allow for the CCID to move from one NCO to another but will not allow for phase alignment.

briefdescription.para: Updates specified CCID, with a configuration defined in CarrierCfg structure.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeMix_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

: This API is deprecated in the release 2023.2. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with the following API sequence: XDfeMix_GetCurrentCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg); XDfeMix_UpdateCCinCCCfg(InstancePtr, CCCfg, CCID, CarrierCfg); XDfeMix_SetNextCCCfgAndTrigger(InstancePtr, CCCfg);

briefdescription.para: Sets antenna gain.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot). Applies gain to downlink only in switchable mode.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeMix_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

briefdescription.para: Updates antenna configuration of all antennas.

detaileddescription.para: Applies gain to downlink only in switchable mode.

parameterdescription.para: Structure containing the array of all antenna gain configurations.

simplesect.para: Clear event status with XDfeMix_ClearEventStatus() before running this API.

briefdescription.para: Returns current trigger configuration.

detaileddescription.para: In switchable mode ignores LOW_POWER trigger as it is not used, instead reads SWITCH trigger configuration.

briefdescription.para: Sets trigger configuration.

detaileddescription.para: In switchable mode ignores LOW_POWER trigger as it is not used, instead sets SWITCH trigger configuration.

briefdescription.para: Gets DUC/DDC overflow status.
Gets Mixer overflow status.
Gets interrupt mask status.
Sets interrupt mask.

parameterdescription.para:
Interrupt mask flags container.
0 - does not mask corresponding interrupt
1 - masks corresponding interrupt

briefdescription.para: Gets event status.
Clears event status.

parameterdescription.para:
Clear event status container.
0 - does not clear corresponding event status
1 - clear corresponding event status

briefdescription.para: Sets the delay, which will be added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).
Reads the delay, which will be added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).
Returns sum of data latency and number of taps.

parameterdescription.para: Tap value to be added to the data latency.
Returned Data latency value in clock cycles.

briefdescription.para: Returns predefined Central Tap value for chosen RATE.
Enables uplink or downlink register bank.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Channel Filter instance.
Register bank value to be set.

briefdescription.para: This API gets the driver and HW design version.
